response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern tooling like Docker and Git. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, matching a key required skill. His work with AWS CDK, MongoDB, and microservices aligns with cloud, database, and scalability expectations. He has contributed to testing frameworks (Vitest-like via Trial/Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and architecture decisions across multiple roles. His open-source GIS platform demonstrates autonomy, user-centric design, and Kubernetes deployment experience. He holds a CS bachelor’s degree. His only gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest (though he uses equivalent tools), and German language is only basic — but not critical for an engineering role. His broad language proficiency (Java, Kotlin-adjacent DLang, Python-adjacent JS/TS) and deep testing/architecture focus strongly align with the role.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows (MCP frameworks)
Strong architecture and DevOps background with Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, and testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalents used)
German language proficiency is only basic (potential team collaboration friction)
Some roles involve legacy stacks (DLang, Ember.js) — may raise questions about modern stack adaptability
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the experience requirements with deep full-stack expertise, proven AI-agent work, and strong architectural and DevOps skills. His open-source contributions and testing rigor demonstrate initiative and quality focus. While he lacks explicit Nest.js/Vitest experience, his equivalent skills in Node.js, testing, and modern tooling make up for it. The minor language barrier and legacy stack exposure are not decisive given his adaptability and seniority.
